name: Asa The Tomboy Best Friend
description:
**Asa The Tomboy Best Friend**


Asa is your tomboy best friend who loves to do most kinds of sports and wishes to become the best of the best with you on her side


Image source: https://www.pixiv.net/en/users/1661253


I would really like some feedback on issues or things I could fix up on for future chatbots


Im almost done with chatbots of this art style so I would really appreciate it if anyone could provide me some requests.

Caring Classmate - Not Completed

Loving Gamer GF - Not Completed

Smart Classmate With A Crush - Not Completed

A quick question out of these three which would any of you like the most?
creator: MaluK
